name: BTC Balance Reclaim Continuation v1
edge_mechanism: trend pullback continuation after deeper value reclaim into structural support
thesis: BTC 4h is the best-fit primary lane for testing whether deeper pullbacks inside a choppy structure can still deliver a modest continuation leg after price reclaims fast value. The edge is not trend worship; it is a short continuation burst after balance repair.
invalidation_condition: Abort if repaired pullbacks rarely reclaim balance, if continuation travel is too shallow after costs, or if the setup remains too sparse.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Price pulls back materially into support inside a broad range, reclaims fast value, and then continues far enough for a modest second leg before reversion resumes.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: Even in chop, repaired pullbacks can produce short continuation bursts after inventory resets. BTC should express that more cleanly than thinner assets.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: BTC 4h is appropriate because pullback-and-reclaim structure is visible and less noisy than 1h while still dense enough to test.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If the market remains pure range rotation, repaired pullbacks will reclaim value but fail to extend enough after entry.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If entries are valid but second-leg travel is weak, shorten exit ambition and de-risk faster before changing pullback grammar.
pre_submit_reasoning.expected_outcome_pattern: A workable number of repaired pullbacks with front-half exits doing most of the expectancy and limited runner contribution.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_success: BTC 4h plus one confirmation lane show credible density and positive post-cost continuation after balance reclaim.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_failure: 0 trades, too-sparse output, or reclaimed pullbacks that repeatedly stall immediately.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; pullback depth, reclaim, and recovery confirmation are complementary
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: managed by broad reclaim logic instead of exact candle choreography

validation_basket.why_included: Best clean lane for repaired pullback continuation in the active basket.
validation_basket.continue_if: Credible density with positive post-cost continuation after reclaim.
validation_basket.rotate_away_if: Reclaims happen but second-leg travel is consistently too shallow, or density is poor.
validation_basket.expected_if_right: Repeated pullback repairs that travel enough for modest continuation harvests.

validation_basket.why_included: Checks whether the mechanism is structural across majors rather than BTC-specific.
validation_basket.continue_if: ETH shows comparable repaired-pullback continuation density.
validation_basket.expected_if_right: Similar but slightly noisier repaired continuation than BTC.

validation_basket.why_included: Tests whether the same repaired-pullback idea survives on a faster adjacent lane.
validation_basket.continue_if: 1h preserves the mechanism without collapsing into noise.
validation_basket.rotate_away_if: 1h becomes noisy or overtrades without edge.
validation_basket.expected_if_right: More signals than 4h with smaller but still tradable continuation legs.
